findings.message: Mutation accepts 'description' parameter but never uses it. The parameter is passed to the function signature but not forwarded to repository.create_item(), and the database model does not have a 'description' field. This silently ignores client input.
findings.suggestion: Either (1) remove the unused 'description' parameter if not needed, (2) update the database model and repository.create_item() to accept and store the description, or (3) add input validation that explicitly rejects the description parameter with a clear error message.
